# RecPan

> RecPan s.r.o. — next-generation solar panel recycling technology. Closed-loop recovery of glass, aluminum, silicon, and copper from end-of-life photovoltaic panels. Based in Prague, Czech Republic, serving Europe.

## Links

- [Home](https://rec-pan.eu/)
- [News](https://rec-pan.eu/news)
- [Career](https://rec-pan.eu/career)
- [Sitemap](https://rec-pan.eu/sitemap.xml)
